final:
// // When en is 0, subtract b from a; when en is 1, add a and b
module top_module (
	input [3:0] a, 
	input [3:0] b, 
	input en, 
	output reg [3:0] y);always @(*) 
		case (en)
			0: y = a + b;
			1: y = a - b;
		endcase
	
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // When en is 0, subtract b from a; when en is 1, add a and b
